title: fagraea litoralis
intro: Fagraea litoralis, also known as the Sea Gardenia or Beach Gardenia, is a species of flowering plant in the family Gentianaceae. Traditionally, Fagraea litoralis has been used for its medicinal properties, which include its antiseptic, anti-inflammatory, and antimicrobial properties. The plant is believed to have various health benefits, including reducing fever, relieving respiratory issues, and soothing skin irritations. In herbal preparations, Fagraea litoralis is often used as a tea, infusion, or tincture, and is also sometimes used in traditional medicine to treat various ailments.
